name: Vienna Coffee
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sugar or 1 cup powdered sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Store the mixture in a tightly covered jar for freshness.
3. To serve, add approximately 2 tablespoons of the mixture to a cup containing boiling water.
4. Top with a tablespoon of whipped cream before serving.
